q1_process: Real-time fraud detection for a neobank's card transactions
q3_volume: 3 years of labeled transaction data, 200+ features
q4_direct_cost: $50 per fraud incident, $100k regulatory fine per breach
q5_current_performance: 85% precision, 70% recall, high false positive rate
q5_frustrations: too many false positives, slow to adapt to new fraud patterns
q6_measurement: daily confusion matrix, fraud loss tracking, customer complaint rate
